title: BEM-843 commit null diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
created=str(now)
# Diagnose likely commit stage from current checkout and write into task result. Commit may be broken, so proof also appears in codex result.
paths=['.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml','scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh','scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh']
summary=[]
for raw in paths:
    p=Path(raw)
    if p.exists():
        txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        summary.append({'path':raw,'exists':True,'has_git_commit':'git commit' in txt,'has_git_push':'git push' in txt,'has_git_add':'git add' in txt,'contains_commit_changes':'Commit changes' in txt or 'Commit result' in txt,'preview':txt[:1200]})
    else:
        summary.append({'path':raw,'exists':False})
Path('governance/state').mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/state/bem843_diagnose_commit_stage_null.json').write_text(json.dumps({'bem':'BEM-843','status':'commit_stage_diagnosed','summary':summary,'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.append('governance/state/bem843_diagnose_commit_stage_null.json')
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed why Codex task changed files but commit_sha remains null: inspected codex-runner commit-related sections and helper scripts')
"""
No issue comments.
